query: HarmonyOS ArkTS/ArkUI platform fact check. API level: 22. Stage goal: verify exact local API usage while implementing. Focus: Implementing a circular-reveal theme toggle in ArkUI ArkTS: snapshot the page root via @ohos.arkui.componentSnapshot.get into a PixelMap, show it in an overlay Image, flip isDarkMode + setColorMode underneath, then drive animateTo(~500ms) shrinking a Circle (centered at the touch point) used as .clip on the overlay so the new theme reveals from the touch point. Need exact import, get() signature/return/Promise, how to feed a PixelMap into Image, and whether .clip(Shape) re-evaluates correctly inside animateTo.. Task constraint: Theme toggle (deep-color scenario 2) must play a circular reveal from the touch point. Plan: onTouch records window-relative (x,y) into @State touchX/touchY; toggleTheme snapshots root via componentSnapshot.get, flips isDarkMode + setColorMode, shows an overlay Image of the old snapshot, then animateTo({duration:500}) shrinks a Circle clip radius from maxCornerDistance to 0 anchored at touch point; on finish hide overlay.. Project evidence: Project imports from @kit.ArkUI (router) and @kit.AbilityKit (common). ArkUI primitives animateTo, .clip, Image, Circle, Shape are available in ArkUI. No existing componentSnapshot usage in the project. Theme button is a CorneredFlatIconButton in the top bar; root is the outer Column in Index.build().. Platform surfaces: @ohos.arkui.componentSnapshot.get (id, callback/promise) -> PixelMap; componentSnapshot.createListener / @ohos.multimedia.image PixelMap; ArkUI animateTo({duration, curve, onFinish}, () => state change); ArkUI universal attribute .clip(Shape) and Circle({center:[x,y], radius}); ArkUI Image(src: PixelMap | ResourceStr) and @State driving overlay visibility. Extra constraints: Give the exact module import for componentSnapshot and the get() call shape (sync callback vs Promise<PixelMap>) and any required component id/getId.; Confirm whether Image accepts a PixelMap directly as src, and how to hold it in a @State field for re-render.; Confirm whether mutating a Circle radius held in @State inside the animateTo closure actually animates the .clip on the overlay Image (re-evaluates per frame), or whether a different attribute must be animated.; Flag lifecycle/threading constraints: must snapshot be taken before or after setColorMode; is the snapshot async; any delay needed.; Flag forbidden/invalid local usage (e.g., animating non-animatable attributes, clip not re-evaluating).. Check only: exact import/module/type/member/signature and minimal call shape; API-level availability for this call; required permission/config/context; return/error/null/default/conflict semantics; call-site lifecycle/threading constraints; compile/runtime failure traps. Quality bar: a coder can write or check the local code from the answer: exact import/module/type/member/signature, minimal call shape, context/permission/config, lifecycle/threading, return/error/null/default/conflict semantics, forbidden local usage, and validation check. Return concise evidence bullets only. Use these slots when applicable: exact_api, exact_import, return_error, context_permission, lifecycle_threading, local_forbidden, local_validation, planned_fallback. For critical slots, write `slot: none` when the fact is not applicable or not known. If sources disagree or the fact is unavailable, state the conflict or unknown explicitly; do not smooth it over. You may add extra:<name> if a critical fact does not fit. Do not invent missing facts. Max 8 bullets. Format each bullet as '- slot: fact'. No preface, headings, examples, tutorials, or steps.
